discovery.name: GL_OPEN_PERIOD
discovery.sql: SELECT period_name PERIOD_NAME FROM ( SELECT ps.period_name, p.end_date, CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN p.start_date AND p.end_date THEN 0 ELSE 1 END is_current FROM gl_period_statuses ps JOIN gl_ledgers led ON led.ledger_id = ps.ledger_id JOIN gl_periods p ON p.period_set_name = led.period_set_name AND p.period_name = ps.period_name WHERE ps.ledger_id = 300000046975971 AND ps.application_id = 101 AND ps.closing_status = 'O' ORDER BY is_current ASC, p.end_date DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

base_read.sql: SELECT bb.concat_account AS CONCAT_ACCOUNT, TO_CHAR(bb.period_net_dr) AS PERIOD_NET_DR, TO_CHAR(bb.last_update_date,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPD FROM gl_budget_balances bb WHERE bb.ledger_id = 300000046975971 AND bb.budget_name = 'Budget' AND bb.period_name = '${PERIOD_NAME}' AND bb.currency_code = 'USD' AND bb.concat_account IN ('101-10-11102-000-000-000','101-10-11200-000-000-000','101-10-12101-000-000-000','101-10-12310-000-000-000') AND bb.period_net_dr = 1000 AND bb.last_update_date >= SYSDATE - INTERVAL '4' HOUR

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.run_name AS RUN_NAME, i.status AS IFACE_STATUS, i.error_message AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM gl_budget_interface i WHERE i.run_name = '${PREFIX}RT-GLBUD-B'
